docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,000.00 FILED BY BRACKIN, ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT CAPITAL ONE, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-24-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO CAPITAL ONE, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $125 SERVED MAR-06-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CAPITAL ONE, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION
SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED RETURNED WITHOUT ORIGINAL SUBPOENA

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ANDREW BRACKIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CAPITAL ONE, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER FOR DISMISSAL W/O PREJUDICE NO APPEARANCES ALL PARTIES
